description_long: This is a modern, low-profile black sofa with a sleek, rectangular silhouette and broad, blocky armrests. The upholstery appears to be made of glossy black leather or faux leather, giving it a slightly reflective, smooth finish. The seat and backrest are both thickly padded, with the seat cushion forming a single, continuous bench and the backrest running the full length of the sofa. The armrests are at the same height as the backrest, creating a uniform, boxy appearance. No legs are visible, suggesting a base that is either recessed or fully enclosed by the upholstery. The overall design is minimalist and contemporary, suitable for urban environments such as lobbies, waiting areas, or modern public spaces.
description: A sleek, black leather sofa with a low, boxy profile, broad armrests, and a continuous seat and backrest. The glossy finish and minimalist design give it a modern, urban appeal.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full width of the sofa, with broad armrests and a continuous seat and backrest.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thick, blocky armrest and the depth of the seat cushion.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the straight, uninterrupted backrest and the sofa's solid, enclosed base.
description_view_3: Opposite side view mirroring the armrest and seat depth, emphasizing the sofa's symmetrical design.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Single, continuous seat cushion and a single, continuous back cushion, both attached and uniform in size.
attribute_armrest_style: Broad, rectangular armrests at the same height as the backrest, straight profile, fully padded and integrated into the sofa's boxy form.
attribute_leg_design: No visible legs; the base appears fully enclosed or recessed, giving the sofa a grounded, monolithic look.
attribute_backrest_type: Low, straight, continuous backrest running the full width of the sofa, with attached padding and no visible segmentation or tufting.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid black upholstery with a smooth, glossy leather texture and no visible decorative stitching or pattern.
